title: crotalaria exilis
intro: Crotalaria exilis, also known as the slender rattle pod or small rattle box, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. It is native to tropical Africa and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant's leaves and seeds have been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, with its health benefits attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, Crotalaria exilis is often used as a decoction or infusion, with its leaves and seeds being dried and then made into a tea or tincture.
